title: Committed fixture task with unresolved uncertainty
test_first_requirement: Run the named covering test and preserve unresolved evidence as Unknown.
acceptance_criteria: The task artifact remains durable even when final evidence is unresolved.
preserved_behavior: CANNOT_VERIFY_FROM_DIFF remains visible and blocks an unconditional release pass.
global_constraints_verbatim: Audit wide. Fix narrow. Prove everything.
stop_conditions: Stop if the missing external evidence cannot be obtained safely.
